§6Concrete Tile§f:
The §6Concrete Tile §f(advancedrocketry:concrete) is a §ebasic building block §f in Advanced Rocketry. It is the §6primary construction material §f for §6rocket launch pads §f and §6space stations§f.

§6Production Path (recipes/blockconcrete.json)§f:
Shapeless recipe with 3 ingredients:
- 1× §6Sand §f(minecraft:sand, metadata 32767 for any colour)
- 1× §6Gravel §f(minecraft:gravel)
- 1× §6Water Bucket §f(minecraft:water_bucket)
- Yields 16× Concrete Tile

§6Function§f:
- §bBuilding block §f: standard §6stone-class §fblock with §bblast resistance 30 §f
- §bLight opacity §f: §bfull §f — emits no light
- §bRequired for §f: §6Launch Pad §f(see §6Launch Pad §f quest), §6Docking Pad §f, §6Space Elevator §f
- §bTexture §f: smooth grey §6concrete-like §f appearance

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 26 items the Concrete Tile is a component of, including:
- §6Launch Pad §f(advancedrocketry:launchpad)
- §6Docking Pad §f(advancedrocketry:landingpad)
- §6Landing Float §f(advancedrocketry:landingfloat)
- §6Airlock Door §f(advancedrocketry:airlock_door)
- §6Space Elevator §f(advancedrocketry:spaceelevatorcontroller)
- §6Rocket Builder §f(advancedrocketry:rocketbuilder)
- §6Station Builder §f(advancedrocketry:stationbuilder)

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: a §6water bucket §f is §breturned §f when crafting; use a §6stack of water buckets §f for mass production
- §eTip§f: the §6Concrete Tile §f recipe is in the §6minecraft:crafting_shapeless §f category, not a §6machine §f — craft in a §6Crafting Table §f
- §cWarning§f: the Concrete Tile is §cnot §f a §6vanilla Minecraft §fconcrete — it is a §bseparate §f AR block
- §cWarning§f: §6concrete §f is §cdifferent §f from §6white concrete §f and §6coloured concrete §f in vanilla Minecraft
